hero.name: Gonzalo Robinson
hero.description: AI Integration Specialist building production-ready AI systems that scale. Leading AI automation initiatives with Azure OpenAI, creating AI-powered pipelines, and leveraging generative AI tools to accelerate enterprise development.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Software Engineer and AI Integration Specialist. Computer Engineering graduate from UNT (GPA 8.93/10, #1 in program). Currently at Sovos leading AI automation initiatives, integrating Azure OpenAI into enterprise systems, and creating AI-powered PR Review pipelines. Advanced expertise in generative AI tools (Cursor, Devin, GitHub Copilot) to accelerate development and enhance code quality. Full-stack development with React, TypeScript, C#, ASP.NET, and SQL.

education.details: GPA: 8.93/10. #1 in Computer Engineering. Dean's List honoree and National Flag Bearer.

certifications: Accelerate Development with AI and Cursor
AI Coding Agents with GitHub Copilot and Cursor
Build AI Agents and Automate Workflows with n8n

roles.title: Software Engineer I
bullets: AI Integration Leader: Designing and implementing solutions with Azure OpenAI for business process automation and productivity enhancement
Generative AI Specialist: Advanced use of Cursor AI, Devin, and GitHub Copilot to accelerate development, generate high-quality code, and optimize workflows
AI-Powered Automation: Created pipelines with Devin to automate PR Review, code analysis, and continuous quality improvement through generative AI
AI-Enhanced CI/CD: Implementing CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps that incorporate AI for automated dependency updates and deployment optimization
Developing REST APIs that integrate Azure OpenAI for intelligent data processing and automated decision-making
Building scalable full-stack solutions using React, TypeScript, C#, ASP.NET, and SQL
Designing and configuring cloud infrastructure on Azure across multiple environments (development, staging, production)

roles.title: Dev Intern
bullets: Developed new features in React (frontend) and C#/ASP.NET (backend), leveraging AI tools to accelerate development and improve quality
Actively participated in Scrum and Agile methodologies, collaborating in code reviews and pair programming with generative AI assistance
Worked with REST APIs, service integration, and version control using Git

roles.title: QA Intern
bullets: Developed comprehensive E2E test suite from scratch using Playwright and TypeScript, covering critical user flows
Implemented automated testing, integration tests, and executed manual QA to ensure product quality
Documented test cases and bug reports using project management tools

contact.title: Get In Touch
